title: Student Services
tmdbOverview: Nineteen-year-old Laura is stressed by her first year at college when money worries distract her from her studies and so, desperate for cash, she answers an online advertisement for intimate companionship that leads her down a dangerous path.
synopsis: Student Services (2010) is a drama film from France. It carries a 6.0 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 18 certification (DE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
